base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of bowser_walk — a character (boss) from 1985 super mario bros. Bowser's body takes 4 NES 8×16 sprites in composition. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 2-frame walk cycle at 2×2-tile scale — Bowser's body takes 4 NES 8×16 sprites in composition; head bobs as legs alternate
